Orion Dynamics.subject: Invoice AR-1041 – $4,200.00 Due May 9, 2026 – ACASO Inc.
Orion Dynamics.body:
Hi Marcus,

Please find attached Invoice AR-1041 for services rendered in March 2026. A summary is below for your reference:

  Invoice Number : AR-1041
  Invoice Date   : April 9, 2026
  Amount Due     : $4,200.00
  Payment Due    : May 9, 2026
  Payment Terms  : Net-30

This invoice covers the ACASO platform subscription and onboarding support for Q1 2026 as outlined in your service agreement.

Payment can be made via ACH (preferred), wire transfer, or check. Our remittance details are included on the attached invoice. Please reference AR-1041 on your payment.

Don't hesitate to reach out if you have any questions or if your team needs a revised remittance format.

Best regards,
Sophia Reeves
Accounts Receivable | ACASO Inc.
ar@acaso.com | +1 (415) 882-3300

Cascade Partners.subject: Invoice AR-1055 – $11,800.00 Due April 22, 2026 – ACASO Inc.
Cascade Partners.body:
Hi Derek,

Hope you're having a good week. Please find Invoice AR-1055 attached for your records.

  Invoice Number : AR-1055
  Invoice Date   : March 23, 2026
  Amount Due     : $11,800.00
  Payment Due    : April 22, 2026
  Payment Terms  : Net-30

This invoice reflects the Q1 2026 platform fee and the expanded data integration module activated for your team in February. Per your agreement, payment is due within 30 days of the invoice date.

Please confirm receipt at your earliest convenience, and let us know if you need any supporting documentation for your AP workflow.

Looking forward to a smooth close on this one.

Warm regards,
Sophia Reeves
Accounts Receivable | ACASO Inc.
ar@acaso.com | +1 (415) 882-3300

Cascade Partners.subject: Re: Invoice AR-1055 – $11,800.00 Due April 22, 2026 – ACASO Inc.
Cascade Partners.body:
Hi Sophia,

Apologies for the delayed response – it's been a hectic couple of months on our end.

We're aware of the outstanding balance and we absolutely intend to take care of it. We've been navigating some cash flow challenges following a slower-than-expected Q1 close. The team is working through it and we expect things to normalize soon.

We'll sort it out shortly – just bear with us a little longer. I'll be in touch once we have a clearer timeline.

Thanks for your patience.

Derek Hollis
Accounts | Cascade Partners
accounts@cascadepartners.com

Cascade Partners.subject: Re: Invoice AR-1055 – Payment Now 28 Days Past Due – Action Required
Cascade Partners.body:
Hi Derek,

Thank you for your note last week. We understand that cash flow pressures arise, and we appreciate you reaching out.

However, Invoice AR-1055 for $11,800.00 is now 28 days past its due date of April 22, 2026, and we haven't received a payment commitment with a specific date.

We'd like to work with you on a resolution. Options we can accommodate:
  1. Full payment at your earliest convenience
  2. A structured payment plan (e.g., two installments over 30 days) with a written schedule

Could you please reply with a specific payment date or propose a plan by this Friday, May 22? Without a confirmed timeline, we will need to escalate this account in accordance with our collections process.

We value the relationship with Cascade Partners and want to resolve this collaboratively. Please don't hesitate to call me directly at +1 (415) 882-3300 if it's easier to discuss.

Best,
Sophia Reeves
Accounts Receivable | ACASO Inc.
ar@acaso.com | +1 (415) 882-3300

Meridian Group.subject: Invoice AR-1072 – $28,500.00 Due March 21, 2026 – ACASO Inc.
Meridian Group.body:
Hi Patricia,

Please find Invoice AR-1072 attached for your review and processing.

  Invoice Number : AR-1072
  Invoice Date   : February 19, 2026
  Amount Due     : $28,500.00
  Payment Due    : March 21, 2026
  Payment Terms  : Net-30

This invoice covers the annual ACASO Enterprise license renewal and the Q4 2025 professional services engagement (implementation phase 2) as documented in Change Order #3 to your Master Service Agreement.

Given the size of this invoice, I wanted to flag it early so your AP team has sufficient lead time. Please don't hesitate to reach out if you need a W-9, updated banking details, or any documentation your finance team requires.

Thank you for the continued partnership, Patricia. We're excited to support Meridian Group's growth this year.

Best regards,
Sophia Reeves
Accounts Receivable | ACASO Inc.
ar@acaso.com | +1 (415) 882-3300

Meridian Group.subject: Re: Invoice AR-1072 – $28,500.00 Due March 21, 2026 – ACASO Inc.
Meridian Group.body:
Sophia,

My apologies – this one has slipped through the cracks longer than it should have. I take full responsibility.

We have been in the middle of a significant restructuring of our finance function and a number of payables got held up in the transition. Invoice AR-1072 is approved on our side and is sitting in the payment queue.

I fully expect this to be settled by end of April. You have my word on it.

Sorry again for the delay and thank you for your patience.

Patricia Owens
Chief Financial Officer | Meridian Group
cfo@meridiangroup.com | +1 (312) 774-0900

Meridian Group.subject: Re: Invoice AR-1072 – Missed Payment Commitment – Urgent Follow-Up
Meridian Group.body:
Hi Patricia,

Thank you for your message on May 6. We appreciated the transparency regarding your internal restructuring and accepted your commitment to settle Invoice AR-1072 by the end of April.

Unfortunately, as of today, May 12, 2026, payment has not been received. Invoice AR-1072 for $28,500.00 is now 52 days past its original due date of March 21, 2026.

This balance is now significantly overdue and we are unable to defer further action without a concrete resolution. We are requesting:

  1. Immediate wire transfer of the full amount, OR
  2. A written payment plan with specific dates and partial amounts, confirmed by reply to this email no later than May 15, 2026.

Failure to respond by May 15 will require us to escalate this matter to our collections team and, if necessary, engage legal counsel as permitted under our service agreement.

Patricia, we have valued this relationship and want to find a way forward that works for both organizations. Please respond urgently so we can avoid that path.

Regards,
Sophia Reeves
Accounts Receivable | ACASO Inc.
ar@acaso.com | +1 (415) 882-3300

CC: Daniel Park, VP Finance – dpark@acaso.com
